finding_results.notes: Reworked the aftermath so the library exit and corridor walk ride on bodily residue, spatial compression, and Hermione's reaction instead of repeated warm-house cues. Kept the prepared-bedroom beat and reserved the explicit temperature escalation for the single warmest-point passage in her room.

summary: Reduced ambient-magic-as-mood fallback in the post-kiss aftermath while preserving the Manor's prepared-room intervention and the later warmest-ever escalation.
